title: Uniao Heat Wave
lead: União is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.03. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in União has resulted in extremely high temperatures, leading to a critical situation. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) has reached 13.1 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity of 61% and wind speed of 11.6 km/h are exacerbating the situation, making it feel even hotter.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
